scripts.test:hardening: pnpm --filter @arena/shared build && node --require ts-node/register --test --test-concurrency=1 test/common/arena-surface-boundary.guard.test.ts test/arena/rate-limit-http.test.ts test/arena/arena.test.ts --test-name-pattern "arena surface boundary guard|high-risk routes declare explicit rate-limit metadata|auth challenge and verify use independent client buckets and expose 429 envelopes|response submission limits authenticated respondents per user bucket|bet prepare and confirm each enforce their own authenticated user bucket|internal monitoring routes inherit the internal rate-limit bucket by boundary metadata|effective sample counter rebuild stays correct after concurrent multi-respondent submissions and review finalization|dispatch excludes explicitly risky respondents while keeping safe candidates eligible|dispatch enforces sample constraints using wallet binding history and active tags|dispatch softly prioritizes high-quality stable respondents when slots are limited|interest-matched respondents are preferred but cannot monopolize limited dispatch slots|repeated dispatch does not create duplicate active tasks when tag-based scoring is enabled|internal dispatch preview explains why candidates are boosted, reserved, or blocked|respondent and public reads do not expose dispatch scoring internals"
scripts.test:arena: pnpm --filter @arena/shared build && node --require ts-node/register --test test/arena/arena.test.ts test/arena/discovery-config-phase2.test.ts test/arena/reward-payout.service.test.ts test/arena/adjudication-http.test.ts test/arena/dispatch-task-expiry-automation.test.ts test/arena/http-error-mapping.test.ts test/arena/process-role-bootstrap.test.ts test/arena/start-worker-script.test.ts test/arena/requester-delivery-transport.test.ts test/arena/runtime-contract-alerts.test.ts test/arena/scheduler-queue.test.ts test/arena/internal-responses-http.test.ts test/arena/rate-limit-http.test.ts test/arena/ops-alert-notifier.service.test.ts
